title: David Wilcock, known for ‘Ancient Aliens’ and paranormal study, dies at 53
description: David Wilcock, a well-known influencer who studied aliens and the paranormal, had health problems and was mired in debt when he died by suicide on April 20, according to Colorado police and his family.

title: 2,200-year-old Roman shipwreck reveals the secret formula that kept ancient ships afloat
description: Rest of World News: On the coast of Croatia, a Roman-era shipwreck has provided archaeologists with some remarkable insight into how ancient ships were constructed and ma.

title: Fossil Ridge grad Tanner Arkin signs in NFL as undrafted free agent
description: Fossil Ridge grad Tanner Arkin played college football at Colorado State and then Illinois and is now the latest SaberCat headed to the NFL.

title: Curiosity Rover uncovers fresh organic clues on Ancient Mars
description: In a significant step forward for the search for signs of ancient life beyond Earth,... The post Curiosity Rover uncovers fresh organic clues on Ancient Mars appeared first on NASASpaceFlight.com .

title: Panaiyur fossil assemblage dates back to Holocene period: study
description: A study reveals the Panaiyur fossil assemblage dates to the middle to late Holocene, enhancing understanding of coastal evolution.
